prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic anime-style poster on a pure black background. Show a young woman from the upper body, turned three-quarters away with her back and right shoulder visible, looking slightly over her left shoulder; her face is intentionally covered by one opaque dark brown square censor block. She has a short glossy bob haircut in black, with strong red-pink rim lighting tracing the outer edges of her hair, neck, shoulders, and shirt. She wears a plain fitted warm gray beige short-sleeve T-shirt, softly wrinkled, with realistic anatomy and dramatic low-key lighting. The mood is mysterious, elegant, and book-cover-like, with high contrast, deep shadows, subtle skin highlights, and a polished digital illustration finish. At the top center, include exactly 3 discrete graphic/text elements: 1 small thin Japanese text line reading 間田内, 1 large spaced Japanese title reading 真　名, and 1 tiny red eyeglasses icon centered beneath the title with faint horizontal divider lines extending left and right. Keep the composition minimal, lots of empty black space above the character, no additional objects, no watermark, no border, and no extra text.
